summary: Completed backend testing of unified GET /api/dashboard endpoint. All 15 tests passed. The endpoint correctly aggregates governance health, onboarding state, recent activity, stats, and governance insights into a single DashboardResponse.
passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard returns 200 with all required top-level fields (trust_id, trust_name, health_score, onboarding_state, recent_activity, stats, governance_insights)
health_score contains full HealthScoreResponse (trust_id, total_score, max_score, color, criteria, calculated_at)
health_score.criteria has 5 items with name, description, points, max_points, achieved
onboarding_state contains all 5 boolean fields (entities_confirmed, calendar_set, minutes_generated, distribution_logged, checklist_dismissed)
recent_activity returns limited list (max 10 items) with correct structure (type, id, trust_id, title, created_at)
stats contains total_decisions, pending_reviews, total_distributions, ytd_distributions_amount as expected types
governance_insights generated from unachieved criteria with type, criterion_name, title, description, action_path, action_label, points
governance_insights count matches unachieved criteria count
Dashboard returns 404 if user has no trusts (error message: 'No trust found')
GET /api/activity with trust_id filter works correctly
GET /api/activity with limit parameter works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint correctly reuses existing logic without duplicating heavy computation
Helper functions properly abstracted for shared use between endpoints
Error handling returns proper 404 when user has no trusts
governance_insights properly generated from unachieved health criteria
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified dashboard endpoint fully tested at GET /api/dashboard. The endpoint aggregates health_score (reuses calculate_health_score), onboarding_state (reuses get_onboarding_state), recent_activity (reuses get_recent_activity with limit=10), stats (get_dashboard_stats helper), and governance_insights (generate_governance_insights from unachieved criteria). Existing endpoints /api/onboarding and /api/activity still work correctly after refactoring.
